# Smarter

Smarter is an open-source framework for authoring and managing AI resources.

Official website: https://smarter.sh/

## Primary Documentation

- https://docs.smarter.sh/

- https://docs.smarter.sh/smarter-platform/installation.html

- https://docs.smarter.sh/smarter-framework.html

- https://docs.smarter.sh/smarter-resources.html

- https://docs.smarter.sh/contributors.html


## Developer Resources

- https://smarter.sh/developers

- https://smarter.sh/cli

- https://hub.docker.com/r/mcdaniel0073/smarter

- https://github.com/smarter-sh/smarter-python

- https://pypi.org/project/smarter-api/

- https://www.npmjs.com/package/@smarter.sh/ui-chat

- https://www.youtube.com/@project-smarter



## Source Code

- https://github.com/smarter-sh/smarter

- https://github.com/smarter-sh/smarter-infrastructure

- https://github.com/smarter-sh/smarter-deploy

- https://github.com/smarter-sh/smarter-chat

## Blog

- https://blog.smarter.sh/

- https://smarter.sh/privacy
